6:
SELECT
    AVG(CASE WHEN c1.Segment = 'SME' AND c2.Segment = 'LAM' THEN y1.Consumption - y2.Consumption END) AS SME_LAM_diff,
    AVG(CASE WHEN c1.Segment = 'LAM' AND c2.Segment = 'KAM' THEN y1.Consumption - y2.Consumption END) AS LAM_KAM_diff,
    AVG(CASE WHEN c1.Segment = 'KAM' AND c2.Segment = 'SME' THEN y1.Consumption - y2.Consumption END) AS KAM_SME_diff
FROM yearmonth y1
JOIN customers c1 ON y1.CustomerID = c1.CustomerID
JOIN yearmonth y2 ON y1.Date = y2.Date
JOIN customers c2 ON y2.CustomerID = c2.CustomerID
WHERE y1.Date LIKE '2013-%'
AND c1.Currency = 'CZK'
AND y1.Consumption = (SELECT MIN(Consumption) FROM yearmonth WHERE Date LIKE '2013-%' AND CustomerID IN (SELECT CustomerID FROM customers WHERE Currency = 'CZK'))
AND c2.Currency = 'CZK'
AND y2.Consumption = (SELECT MIN(Consumption) FROM yearmonth WHERE Date LIKE '2013-%' AND CustomerID IN (SELECT CustomerID FROM customers WHERE Currency = 'CZK'))
AND c1.Segment < c2.Segment;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7:
SELECT
    c.Segment,
    (SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', y.Date) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -
     SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', y.Date) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) /
    NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', y.Date) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100 AS GrowthPercentage
FROM
    yearmonth y
JOIN
    customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE
    c.Currency = 'EUR'
    AND c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
    AND (strftime('%Y', y.Date) = '2012' OR strftime('%Y', y.Date) = '2013')
GROUP BY
    c.Segment
ORDER BY
    GrowthPercentage DESC;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
